creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text: The removal of lib/libs6.so.2 is fine. If you could update the skalibs dependency from 2.3.8.0 to 2.3.9.0 and the execline dependency from 2.1.4.2 to 2.1.4.5 that would be great. If it's easier though, I can upload a patch to catch that in addition to your changes.
